LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-27-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. PATICE A. GORE, Esq. of LTL Attorneys LLP (Tel: 213-612-8900) for defendant Asian Trans & Co.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
